text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Osaka Hai has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove entered this race expecting to face
off against her rival, but it turns out Silence
Suzuka is not running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, Air Groove heads to the track
determined to give a race worthy of the Empress
name.
